result.stdout:
GitHubReleaseNotes (1.0.12.0)
GitHubReleaseNotes 1.0.12.0+d0358d062c0623cd2aac111c9b564cb99850f204
Stef Heyenrath

  --path                   (Default: ) The path from the git repository. If not
                           supplied, the current folder is used.

  --output                 The location from the generated Release Notes. If not
                           supplied, the output is written to the console.

  --version                (Default: next) Define a custom version name for the
                           latest release instead of the value 'next'.

  --language               (Default: en) Provide the language (two letter
                           according to ISO-639-1) which is used to format the
                           dates. If not provided, 'en' is used. It's also
                           possible to use a value like 'system', which takes
                           the current system ui language.

  --skip-empty-releases    Define this optional argument to skip writing
                           releases which have no associated Issues or Pull
                           Requests.

  --template               Provide a custom Handlebars template instead of the
                           default template to generate the Release Notes.

  --token                  Provide the GitHub API token as authentication for
                           connecting to private repositories. Or to get more
                           GitHub API requests.

  --login                  Provide the GitHub API login as authentication for
                           connecting to private repositories.

  --password               Provide the GitHub API password as authentication for
                           connecting to private repositories.

  --exclude-labels         Exclude Issues and Pull Requests which have these
                           labels set.

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.

options.description: Exclude Issues and Pull Requests which have these labels set.

Provide the language (two letter according to ISO-639-1) which is used to format the dates. If not provided, 'en' is used. It's also possible to use a value like 'system', which takes the current system ui language.
Provide the GitHub API login as authentication for connecting to private repositories.
The location from the generated Release Notes. If not supplied, the output is written to the console.
Provide the GitHub API password as authentication for connecting to private repositories.
The path from the git repository. If not supplied, the current folder is used.
Define this optional argument to skip writing releases which have no associated Issues or Pull Requests.
Provide a custom Handlebars template instead of the default template to generate the Release Notes.
Provide the GitHub API token as authentication for connecting to private repositories. Or to get more GitHub API requests.
Define a custom version name for the latest release instead of the value 'next'.
